generatedSql:
WITH date_spine AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    business_date,
    1 AS join_key
  FROM clean_transactions
  WHERE business_date >= DATE('2025-01-01')
    AND business_date <= DATE('2025-01-07')
),
sku_scope(item_sku, join_key) AS (
  VALUES
    ('SKU-00001', 1),
    ('SKU-00007', 1),
    ('SKU-00013', 1)
),
sku_day_spine AS (
  SELECT
    sku_scope.item_sku,
    date_spine.business_date,
    sku_scope.item_sku || '|' || date_spine.business_date AS sku_day_key
  FROM sku_scope
  JOIN date_spine ON date_spine.join_key = sku_scope.join_key
),
daily_sales AS (
  SELECT
    item_sku,
    business_date,
    item_sku || '|' || business_date AS sku_day_key,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_return = 0 THEN units_gross ELSE 0 END) AS units_sold,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_return = 0 THEN gross_sales_incl_vat ELSE 0 END) AS revenue_incl_vat,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_return = 0 THEN cogs_ex_vat ELSE 0 END) AS cost_ex_vat
  FROM clean_transactions
  WHERE business_date >= DATE('2025-01-01')
    AND business_date <= DATE('2025-01-07')
    AND item_sku IN ('SKU-00001', 'SKU-00007', 'SKU-00013')
  GROUP BY item_sku, business_date
)
SELECT
  sku_day_spine.item_sku,
  sku_day_spine.business_date,
  COALESCE(daily_sales.units_sold, 0) AS units_sold,
  COALESCE(daily_sales.revenue_incl_vat, 0) AS revenue_incl_vat,
  COALESCE(daily_sales.cost_ex_vat, 0) AS cost_ex_vat
FROM sku_day_spine
LEFT JOIN daily_sales
  ON daily_sales.sku_day_key = sku_day_spine.sku_day_key
ORDER BY sku_day_spine.item_sku, sku_day_spine.business_date;

    AND item_sku IN ('SKU-00127', 'SKU-00132', 'SKU-00137')
  GROUP BY item_sku, business_date
)
SELECT
  sku_day_spine.item_sku,
  sku_day_spine.business_date,
  COALESCE(daily_sales.units_sold, 0) AS units_sold,
  COALESCE(daily_sales.revenue_incl_vat, 0) AS revenue_incl_vat,
  COALESCE(daily_sales.cost_ex_vat, 0) AS cost_ex_vat
FROM sku_day_spine
LEFT JOIN daily_sales
  ON daily_sales.sku_day_key = sku_day_spine.sku_day_key
ORDER BY sku_day_spine.item_sku, sku_day_spine.business_date;

summaryMarkdown: Builds a complete SKU-by-day series and fills missing sales days with zeroes.

generatedSql:
SELECT
  item_sku,
  business_date,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_return = 0 THEN units_gross ELSE 0 END) AS units_sold,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_return = 0 THEN gross_sales_incl_vat ELSE 0 END) AS revenue_incl_vat,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_return = 0 THEN cogs_ex_vat ELSE 0 END) AS cost_ex_vat
FROM clean_transactions
WHERE business_date >= DATE('2025-03-01')
  AND business_date <= DATE('2025-03-15')
  AND item_sku IN ('SKU-00146', 'SKU-00152', 'SKU-00158')

prompt: Can you break out daily units sold, gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT), and cost (excl. VAT) for SKU-00146, SKU-00152, SKU-00158 from 2025-03-01 through 2025-03-15, summed across all stores? Exclude returned rows.
summaryMarkdown: Aggregates units sold, revenue, and cost by SKU and business day across all stores.

generatedSql:
WITH date_spine AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    business_date,
    1 AS join_key
  FROM clean_transactions
  WHERE business_date >= DATE('2025-03-01')
    AND business_date <= DATE('2025-03-15')
),
sku_scope(item_sku, join_key) AS (
  VALUES
    ('SKU-00146', 1),
    ('SKU-00152', 1),
    ('SKU-00158', 1)
),
sku_day_spine AS (
  SELECT
    sku_scope.item_sku,
    date_spine.business_date,
    sku_scope.item_sku || '|' || date_spine.business_date AS sku_day_key
  FROM sku_scope
  JOIN date_spine ON date_spine.join_key = sku_scope.join_key
),
daily_sales AS (
  SELECT
    item_sku,
    business_date,
    item_sku || '|' || business_date AS sku_day_key,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_return = 0 THEN units_gross ELSE 0 END) AS units_sold,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_return = 0 THEN gross_sales_incl_vat ELSE 0 END) AS revenue_incl_vat,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_return = 0 THEN cogs_ex_vat ELSE 0 END) AS cost_ex_vat
  FROM clean_transactions
  WHERE business_date >= DATE('2025-03-01')
    AND business_date <= DATE('2025-03-15')
    AND item_sku IN ('SKU-00146', 'SKU-00152', 'SKU-00158')
  GROUP BY item_sku, business_date
)
SELECT
  sku_day_spine.item_sku,
  sku_day_spine.business_date,
  COALESCE(daily_sales.units_sold, 0) AS units_sold,
  COALESCE(daily_sales.revenue_incl_vat, 0) AS revenue_incl_vat,
  COALESCE(daily_sales.cost_ex_vat, 0) AS cost_ex_vat
FROM sku_day_spine
LEFT JOIN daily_sales
  ON daily_sales.sku_day_key = sku_day_spine.sku_day_key
ORDER BY sku_day_spine.item_sku, sku_day_spine.business_date;
